EmailTemplate.name: EOI Block - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Unit Block
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!CustomerName},
This is with reference to your "Expression of Interest (EOI)" on {!EOIAckDate}. We are happy to inform you that your EOI has been blocked against Unit No. {!UnitNumber} in our system.
You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
